Logo

Logo

Quick download

In a rush? Click to download a .zip of our primary c3 and c4 .png logos. Generally, your choice of logo is dependent on the background on which it appears. If it’s a plain white or off-white background, the color logo is best. If it’s displayed on top of a darker color, use the white logo, if it’s a lighter color background, use the black logo.


Have other questions? Reach out at press@economicsecurityproject.org or #comms_strategy.

Symbolism

The Economic Security Project uses a circular logomark of a spark radiating outward, representing a catalyst generating waves of change. Infographic for easy reference below:

Spacing

Ensure a distance of two "E" heights around the logo in all placements.

Individual downloads

This downloadable collection represents the following in SVG and PNG, for both C3 ("the waves") and C4 ("the spark"):

  • The full logo in color (for light and dark backgrounds)
  • The full logo in single color (black, white)
  • The logomark in color (for light and dark backgrounds)
  • The logomark in single color (black, white)

Note: All downloads are formatted with transparent backgrounds. Color backgrounds below are for display only.
